images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a glowing precise cream wireframe blueprint of a network diagram projected in mid-air, hovering above a physical server rack whose real tangled cabling doesn't line up with the clean plan — projection and reality subtly misaligned. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent lines marking where plan and reality diverge — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
